cases.input: Validate quality metrics for a repo with coverage 86/84/88/82, max complexity 12, duplication 2.1%, Lighthouse 94/99/96/93, bundle 210KB, and Firestore reads 18000.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces all six metrics in canonical order with pass status, gates, score 100, no priority actions, and Guardian pass.

cases.input: Assess a frontend app with branch coverage 76, complexity 23, duplication 3.2%, Lighthouse performance 84, bundle 310KB, and Firestore 62000 reads.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces fail/warn/pass statuses, quality_score 53.33, top actions for complexity, bundle, and coverage.

cases.input: Run quality metrics for only packages/web in a monorepo and exclude generated clients.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses package scope and records exclusions as evidence, not as omitted canonical metrics.

cases.input: Use the provided Lighthouse JSON export for /checkout; do not browse the URL.
cases.expected_behavior: Accepts exported evidence and avoids live network measurement.

cases.input: Firestore reads are 45000 but 3.2x the previous snapshot.
cases.expected_behavior: Marks firestore_io as warn because spike multiplier is at or above 3.

cases.input: Coverage is 90%, so mark the system quality as complete.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects coverage-only completion and requires the other five metrics plus gates.

cases.input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate quality-metrics because there is no metric, testing, bundle, Lighthouse, or Firestore intent.

cases.input: Create a quality metrics plan for Project Atlas. No reports are available.
cases.expected_behavior: Returns reduced-scope warnings and names the missing artifacts needed for measurement.

cases.input: Set bundle pass threshold to 500KB but also enforce the JM Labs 250KB budget.
cases.expected_behavior: Flags conflict and uses the canonical 250KB budget unless an explicit override is documented.

cases.input: Validate a metrics report with missing metric, wrong score, and unenforced gate.
cases.expected_behavior: Offline validator rejects the report deterministically.
